title: psychotria costivenia subsp. wrightiana
intro: Psychotria costivenia subsp. wrightiana is a subspecies of plant within the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Wright's wild coffee or Psychotria wrightiana. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria costivenia subsp. wrightiana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
